name: civil-rights-history-mcp
description: Remote MCP server exposing the Civil Rights History Project oral history archive (Library of Congress / Smithsonian NMAAHC) to Claude Desktop, claude.ai Custom Connectors, and other MCP clients. Backed by Pinecone + Voyage AI; emits citation-grade responses with LoC archive URLs, exact timestamps, audit provenance, and Chicago-style citation blocks.
